scene_summary: A flooded street with possible blocked access and unclear ground conditions.
recommended_actions: Do not walk or drive through the water.
Avoid touching metal objects or electrical infrastructure near the flooded area.
Report the location to emergency services.

solar_assessment.recommendation: Solar analysis is not relevant for this emergency image.

emergency_report.title: Flood risk detected
emergency_report.description: The image shows a flooded access route. The water depth is unknown and may hide electrical or terrain hazards.

translations.pl: Nie wchodź do wody. Przejdź na wyższy teren i zgłoś zagrożenie.
translations.en: Do not enter the water. Move to higher ground and report the hazard.
translations.nl: Ga het water niet in. Ga naar hoger terrein en meld het gevaar.
